pipeline.description: Fetch raw payloads from a public source (network); record to a versioned fixture.
Pure, deterministic parse of raw payloads into typed Trial / PatientCorpus records.
Run the conformance gate: controlled vocabularies, age-bound sanity, duplicate ids, no-leakage.
The validated records — the inputs the (future) atomizer / retriever / judge will consume.

raw.description: Source age string, e.g. '18 Years'. None when the bound is absent.

years.description: Age normalized to years for numeric comparison. None means 'no constraint' — never treat as 0.

demographics.description: Patient-level facts: age, sex, (and birthdate for Synthea).

documents.description: The searchable evidence units for this patient.

patient_id.description: Stable identifier for one patient (one prescreening example).

snapshot_date.description: As-of date. Retrieval/judging may only use documents dated on or before this (leakage-free eval). None for case reports.

source.description: Which public source this corpus came from.

structured.description: Machine-parsed facts (code, description, value, unit) for deterministic threshold checks.

text.description: Human-readable rendering the retriever indexes and the judge cites.

accepts_healthy_volunteers.description: Whether healthy volunteers may enroll. None when unstated.

eligibility_text.description: Verbatim inclusion/exclusion block — the raw model input the atomizer will later split into criteria.

maximum_age.description: Upper age bound; commonly open-ended (years None).

metadata.description: Extra provenance (org study id, status-verified date, keywords).

minimum_age.description: Lower age bound (raw string + normalized years).

phase.description: Trial phase. None when unspecified (e.g. observational studies).

recruitment_status.description: Overall recruitment status at record time.

source.description: Origin of the record; always 'clinicaltrials_gov' for trials.

std_ages.description: Standardized age groups the trial accepts.

vocab_gloss.leakage: A document dated after the patient's snapshot_date — would leak the future into an as-of-time decision.
vocab_gloss.unknown: Evidence absent or inconclusive — the safe default; never treated as clearance.
